allowed_work: read frozen P5 arrays, metadata, Gate 1 final scale records, and frozen V4 best/final raw-temperature predictions
derive deterministic boundary-aware shape/scale and lateral-spreading diagnostics
write the explicit Gate 3 CSV, JSON, Markdown, and fixture artifacts
prohibited_work: modify model parameters, loss, training configuration, split assignment, labels, or P5 data
train or implement a learned scale branch
call the V4 reference solver or generate new labels
write data/, output/, checkpoints/, or logs/

current_v5_semantics.current_data_coverage: The frozen P5 data instantiate only bottom Dirichlet, top Robin, and sides adiabatic. Gate 3 does not claim arbitrary-boundary generalization.

boundary_interface.required_mask_policy: metadata point-index mask and matched binary BC-feature mask must agree exactly
boundary_interface.mixed_bc_extension: Represent future mixed boundaries as multiple explicit region entries. A literal type=mixed must be expanded before the audit and otherwise raises an error.
boundary_interface.coordinate_fallback_contract: Only an explicit per-region coordinate_fallback {axis, extremum, tolerance} can enable it. There is no implicit lowest-z or bottom fallback.
boundary_interface.projection_contract: Apply only in raw physical temperature space. Assign all Dirichlet nodes their prescribed values and preserve every non-Dirichlet node exactly.

frozen_v4_prediction_contract.coverage: best and final archives must each contain all 1,073 split-map sample IDs before Gate 3 runs
frozen_v4_prediction_contract.original_archives: Existing V4 split-aware exports are frozen evidence; missing train and hard_train_holdout coverage may be generated only by read-only inference from those fixed checkpoints into a temporary non-repository path.

metrics_contract.aggregation: sample-first CV-weighted metrics, then cohort mean/median summaries
lateral_spreading_features: q overlap with the CV-weighted lowest-kz quintile
metrics_contract.gate1_residual_relation: Correlate each lateral feature descriptively with log(pred_z_collapsed_1d_operator_K / target_scale_cv_rms_K) from the frozen Gate 1 final-correction CSV.
metrics_contract.causal_limit: Lateral relations are mechanism evidence only and do not establish causality.

protocol.test_role_policy: No test role can select a threshold, formula, or method. All test-role figures are frozen descriptive reporting.
protocol.leakage_guard: Report cross-role input, full-sample, and provenance duplicate groups.
protocol.summary_reconstruction: --verify-summary reconstructs target, oracle, hard-failure, lateral, and leakage summaries from CSV only.
